description_long: This is a plush giraffe toy with a whimsical, stylized design. Its body is covered in a dark fabric adorned with abstract, cream-colored patterns that mimic the spots of a giraffe. The toy features a series of soft, orange felt spikes running down the back of its long neck, and matching orange felt is used for the inner ears and the tip of the tail, which is also adorned with stringy, tassel-like extensions. The legs are short and rounded, giving the toy a sturdy, squat appearance, while the head is elongated with a gentle curve and small, rounded snout. The overall construction appears soft and squeezable, with visible seams and a matte finish typical of fabric toys. No facial features such as eyes or mouth are distinctly visible, giving it a minimalist and modern look.
description: A soft, plush giraffe toy with dark fabric, abstract cream patterns, orange felt spikes, and a tassel tail. The design is minimalist and stylized, with no visible facial features.
description_view_0: The left side of the giraffe toy is visible, showing the orange felt spikes along the neck and the abstract cream patterns on the dark body, with the tassel tail clearly seen.
description_view_1: A front view of the giraffe toy, highlighting the symmetry of the abstract patterns and the alignment of the orange spikes and ears.
description_view_2: The right side of the giraffe toy, similar to the left, displays the orange spikes, abstract patterns, and the tassel tail, with the head turned slightly.
description_view_3: A rear view of the giraffe toy, showing the back of the head, the full line of orange spikes, and the tassel tail extending from the body.
attribute_facial_expression: No distinct facial features or expression are visible; the face is minimalistic and featureless.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright on all four legs with the neck extended upward and the head slightly tilted.
